moments.author: Elon Musk
moments.quote: He takes scamming to a whole new level
moments.why: A fiery jab in his long‑running public feud with Sam Altman, coinciding with Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI and lighting up the tech community.

moments.author: Sam Altman
moments.quote: Homeboy you’re the one selling public market investors on short‑term space datacenters
moments.why: Altman’s rapid and witty comeback to Musk’s insult, mocking his SpaceX orbital data center pitch, went viral across news and social.

moments.author: NBA
moments.quote: A THUNDEROUS dunk from Caleb Wilson
moments.why: Caleb Wilson’s poster‑worthy dunk during NBA Summer League exploded in clips and highlights, instantly trending among sports fans.

moments.author: NBA
moments.quote: These angles of Yang Hansen throwing it down
moments.why: Yang Hansen’s highlight reel poster dunk capped off a standout Summer League night and flooded timelines.
